name: Cookies'n' Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups chocolate sandwich cookie crumbs (about 28 cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs and butter, stirring well. Press firmly on the bottom and halfway up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk, beating until smooth. Stir in the eggs, mixing well. Add 1 tablespoon vanilla extract.
3. Fold in the crumbled cookies into the cream cheese mixture. Pour into the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 400 degrees for 5 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees and continue baking 55 to 60 minutes. The top will be set, and the center may be soft but will become firm when chilled.
5. Combine the sour cream, sugar, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon vanilla in a separate bowl; stir well.
6. Gently spoon the sour cream mixture evenly over the cheesecake, spreading to the edges of the pan. Bake an additional 10 minutes.
7. Cool to room temperature, then cover and chill overnight.
Yield: one 9-inch cheesecake.
